description: Skip lockfile artifact updates (npm and cargo): they fail in Renovate's clone because vite/ and rolldown/ are gitignored. The renovate-lockfiles workflow regenerates lockfiles on renovate/** pushes; gitIgnoredAuthors keeps Renovate managing branches with its commits.

packageRules.description: Ignore upstream toolchain npm packages (vendored via sync-remote or bumped by the proactive catalog workflow); everything else stays enabled so security alerts get fixed.
Ignore oxc crate updates (bumped by the proactive catalog workflow); other cargo crates stay enabled.
Ignore vite-task git dependency digest updates (bumped via the bump-vite-task workflow).
